_comment: Shared test vectors for the ADR-021/verified-submit helpers. Consumed by BOTH core/src/claude_session.rs tests and messaging/whatsapp/src/claude_session.test.ts — the TS ladder is a line-for-line mirror of the Rust one, and this file is what keeps the mirror honest. Add cases here, never fork per-language copies.

last_prompt_row.name: history rows above live row win nothing — LAST ❯ is live
last_prompt_row.pane:
❯ old submitted msg
assistant reply text
❯ current draft

last_prompt_row.name: permission picker renders as prompt row
last_prompt_row.pane:
Allow Bash?
❯ 1. Yes, allow
  2. No, deny

draft_fragment.name: skips leading blank lines and trims

draft_stuck.name: live row still carries our fragment
live row carries fragment as prefix of longer draft
draft_stuck.pane: ❯ remind me tomorrow at 9am about the dentist

draft_stuck.name: pasted-text chip is our unsent draft
cleared live row means submit landed
fragment only in HISTORY row must not re-trigger (2026-07-18 duplicate-repaste bug)
draft_stuck.pane:
❯ remind me tomorrow at 9
assistant: done!
❯ next draft

draft_stuck.name: permission picker row is NOT our draft — never Enter into a dialog
draft_stuck.pane:
Allow Bash?
❯ 1. Yes, allow
  2. No, deny

draft_stuck.name: empty fragment never matches arbitrary rows
empty fragment still detects the paste chip
